papers.title: The ELF4-ELF3-LUX Complex Links the Circadian Clock to Diurnal Control of Hypocotyl Growth
papers.authors: Nusinow DA, Helfer A, Hamilton EE, King JJ, Imaizumi T, Schultz TF, Farre EM, Kay SA

papers.title: The heat response regulators HSFA1s promote Arabidopsis thermomorphogenesis via stabilizing PIF4 during the day
papers.authors: Tan W, Chen J, Yue X, Chai S, Liu W, Li C, Yang F, Gao Y, Rodriguez LG, Resco de Dios V, Zhang D, Yao Y

papers.title: Cell elongation is regulated through a central circuit of interacting transcription factors in the Arabidopsis hypocotyl
papers.authors: Oh E, Zhu JY, Bai MY, Arenhart RA, Sun Y, Wang ZY

papers.title: RCB initiates Arabidopsis thermomorphogenesis by stabilizing the thermoregulator PIF4 in the daytime
papers.authors: Qiu Y, Pasoreck EK, Yoo CY, He J, Wang H, Bajracharya A, Li M, Larsen HD, Cheung S, Chen M

edges.mechanism: ELF3 is required and sufficient as bridge for ELF4-LUX assembly into Evening Complex
edges.evidence_sentence: ELF3 is both necessary and sufficient to form a complex between ELF4 and LUX

edges.mechanism: ELF3 binds LUX to form Evening Complex enabling LUX DNA binding to PIF4 promoter
edges.evidence_sentence: ELF3 is necessary and sufficient to form a complex between ELF4 and LUX

edges.mechanism: Evening Complex binds PIF4 promoter via LUX MYB-like DNA-binding domain to repress transcription
edges.evidence_sentence: LUX targets the complex to promoters of PIF4 and PIF5 in vivo

edges.mechanism: EC binds PIF5 promoter via LUX
edges.evidence_sentence: Evening Complex regulates PIF5 and PIF4 expression through recruitment by LUX

edges.mechanism: CCA1 directly binds TOC1 promoter to repress evening transcription (core morning loop)
edges.evidence_sentence: CCA1 and LHY directly repress TOC1 transcription

edges.mechanism: LHY represses TOC1 transcription redundantly with CCA1
edges.evidence_sentence: CCA1 and LHY directly repress TOC1

edges.mechanism: TOC1 represses CCA1 transcription completing core circadian feedback
edges.evidence_sentence: TOC1 represses CCA1 in evening forming negative feedback

edges.mechanism: PRR9 represses CCA1/LHY in morning
edges.evidence_sentence: morning-expressed PRR9 directly represses CCA1 and LHY

edges.mechanism: PRR7 represses CCA1/LHY around noon
edges.evidence_sentence: midday-expressed PRR7 represses CCA1 and LHY

edges.mechanism: PRR5 represses CCA1/LHY in afternoon
edges.evidence_sentence: afternoon-expressed PRR5 represses CCA1 and LHY

edges.mechanism: PRR5 dampens hypocotyl elongation; prr5 prr7 prr9 triple mutant has long hypocotyls
edges.evidence_sentence: PRR mutants have long hypocotyls

edges.mechanism: PRR7 dampens hypocotyl elongation
edges.evidence_sentence: PRR mutants long hypocotyl

edges.mechanism: PRR9 dampens hypocotyl elongation
edges.evidence_sentence: PRR mutants long hypocotyl

edges.mechanism: TOC1 represses PIF4 transcription and protein activity, inhibiting hypocotyl elongation at night
edges.evidence_sentence: TOC1 represses both transcription of PIF4 and transcriptional activation activity

edges.mechanism: CCA1 indirectly inhibits hypocotyl elongation via clock; cca1 lhy double has long hypocotyl
edges.evidence_sentence: cca1 lhy double mutant has elongated hypocotyl

edges.mechanism: GI restricts thermomorphogenic elongation via TOC1 and direct PIF4 inhibition
edges.evidence_sentence: gi-2 showed increased hypocotyl elongation at high temperatures

edges.mechanism: Warm temperature induces HSFA1d accumulation in light-dependent manner
edges.evidence_sentence: Warm temperature markedly enhanced daytime accumulation of HSFA1d in light-dependent manner

edges.mechanism: HSFA1d binds PIF4 in nucleus and competitively inhibits phyB-PIF4 interaction, stabilizing PIF4
edges.evidence_sentence: HSFA1d interacts with PIF4 and stabilizes it by interfering with phytochrome B interaction

edges.mechanism: HSFA1a stabilizes PIF4 redundantly with HSFA1d
edges.evidence_sentence: PIF4 could interact with HSFA1a and HSFA1b

edges.mechanism: HSFA1b stabilizes PIF4
edges.evidence_sentence: PIF4 could interact with HSFA1a and HSFA1b

edges.mechanism: BIN2 phosphorylates HSFA1d NLS preventing nuclear localization
edges.evidence_sentence: BIN2 inhibits nuclear translocation of HSFA1d by phosphorylating its NLS motif

edges.mechanism: COP1 facilitates HSFA1d nuclear localization by inhibiting BIN2 (non-canonical role)
edges.evidence_sentence: COP1 facilitates warm temperature-triggered HSFA1d nuclear localization by suppressing BIN2-mediated HSFA1d phosphorylation

edges.mechanism: HSFA1d promotes daytime thermomorphogenesis by stabilizing PIF4
edges.evidence_sentence: hypocotyls of HSFA1d-overexpressing transgenic lines were much longer at warm temperatures

edges.mechanism: HSFA1 induces HSFA2 which contributes to thermomorphogenesis
edges.evidence_sentence: HSFA1 factors induce expression of HSFA2 during daytime

edges.mechanism: RCB-HMR complex stabilizes PIF4 in daytime under warm temperature
edges.evidence_sentence: rcb-101/hmr-22 restores thermoresponsive PIF4 accumulation

edges.mechanism: HMR (transcriptional activator with 9aaTAD) stabilizes PIF4
edges.evidence_sentence: Daytime PIF4 stabilization depends on transcriptional activator HEMERA (HMR)

edges.mechanism: RCB binds HMR forming complex required for PIF4 stabilization
edges.evidence_sentence: RCB interacts directly with HMR through reciprocal co-IP

edges.mechanism: ARF6 directly interacts with BZR1 C-terminal domain enhancing cooperative DNA binding
edges.evidence_sentence: ARF6 directly interacted with BZR1 through the C-terminal domain of BZR1

edges.mechanism: ARF6 binds PIF4 bHLH domain enhancing co-binding to shared promoters
edges.evidence_sentence: ARF6 directly interacted with PIF4 through the bHLH domain

edges.mechanism: RGA binds ARF6 and prevents DNA binding
edges.evidence_sentence: RGA interacted with ARF6 and prevented ARF6 binding to target DNA

edges.mechanism: PRE1 sequesters IBH1 to release HBI1, promoting elongation
edges.evidence_sentence: PRE1-OX enhanced auxin sensitivity

edges.mechanism: IBH1 inhibits HBI1, suppressing elongation
edges.evidence_sentence: IBH1-OX significantly reduced sensitivity to auxin in hypocotyl elongation

edges.mechanism: PAR1 binds HBI1 and inhibits DNA binding
edges.evidence_sentence: PAR1 interacts with HBI1 and inhibits HBI1 DNA-binding activity

edges.mechanism: PAR1 binds BEE2 inhibiting bHLH activity
edges.evidence_sentence: PAR1 interacts with BEE2 and inhibits bHLH function

edges.mechanism: BEE2 promotes cell elongation as bHLH growth factor
edges.evidence_sentence: BEE2 contributes to BR-promoted growth

edges.mechanism: PRR5 binds TOC1 promoter to repress (intra-clock loop)
edges.evidence_sentence: PRRs repress evening clock genes

edges.mechanism: TOC1 represses PRR9 expression
edges.evidence_sentence: TOC1 represses morning-expressed PRR9

perturbations.evidence_sentence: elf3 mutant exhibits abnormal hypocotyl growth and is constitutively long-hypocotyl
elf4 mutants have abnormally elongated hypocotyl
lux mutants have abnormally elongated hypocotyl
Loss of PIF4 or PIF5 mitigated hypocotyl length defect of elf3-2
prr5 prr7 prr9 triple mutant has long hypocotyl
cca1 lhy double mutant has long hypocotyl
thermo-insensitive phenotypes observed in eTK; HSFA1a/1b/1d function redundantly
HSFA1d-overexpressing transgenic lines were much longer at warm temperatures
hmr-22 with D516N mutation blocks PIF4 accumulation and thermomorphogenesis
rcb-10 null mutant exhibited only 10% of warm-temperature response of Col-0
arf6;arf8 double mutant showed reduced BR and GA promotion of hypocotyl elongation
pre amiR knockdown reduced auxin sensitivity in hypocotyl elongation
IBH1-OX significantly reduced sensitivity to auxin
PAR1-OX almost completely abolished auxin sensitivity
della pentuple mutant lacking all five DELLA members showed near-normal auxin response
